option.name: originalContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=booking-backend
springdoc.api-docs.enabled=true springdoc.swagger-ui.enabled=true
spring.flyway.enabled=true spring.profiles.active=dev
logging.level.root=INFO logging.level.finki.ukim.emt.booking=DEBUG logging.level.org.springframework=WARN
#logging.file.name=logs/app.log #logging.logback.rollingpolicy.max-file-size=10MB #logging.logback.rollingpolicy.max-history=30 logging.pattern.console=%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} %-5level %logger{36} - %msg%n
jwt.secret=${JWT_SECRET_KEY:default-secret-key} jwt.expiration=864000000 jwt.header=Authorization jwt.token-prefix=Bearer

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=booking-backend
springdoc.api-docs.enabled=true springdoc.swagger-ui.enabled=true
spring.flyway.enabled=true spring.profiles.active=dev
logging.level.root=INFO logging.level.finki.ukim.emt.booking=DEBUG logging.level.org.springframework=WARN
#logging.file.name=logs/app.log #logging.logback.rollingpolicy.max-file-size=10MB #logging.logback.rollingpolicy.max-history=30 logging.pattern.console=%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} %-5level %logger{36} - %msg%n
jwt.secret=DyZYAK22iz72AceuM6KcREs4pw9C7VZ2NzULDAUsfBAo7xgIKB3HKnxWM1AHOC9SN1PjLWjc41iqnrfrsmDHtQ== jwt.expiration=864000000 jwt.header=Authorization jwt.token-prefix=Bearer

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
